summary: The diff implements REQ-5 by replacing the generic 'greater metro area' badge text in the Hero component with 'Serving Marshall, Longview, Jefferson & Surrounding Areas, Texas'. The Hero.tsx file is the only component modified in the diff, and the change is targeted and correct. The Navbar.tsx is mentioned in the file summaries as unchanged (no metro area text found there), and the rest of the Hero content remains intact. No unrelated layout, styling, or content changes are evident in the modified Hero.tsx.
